name: SYS · GitHub Embed
css: Zuar Portal Block Sync — styled to match Zuar Admin UI
Design refs: /zadmin/pages, block editor panel, users & groups
font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
/* ── Header — matches Zuar's dark block editor header ──────────── */
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
/* ── Settings Panel — matches Zuar's right-side editor panel ───── */
.zgm-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1; }
#zgm-toolbar-left  { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; min-width: 0; }
#zgm-toolbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.zgm-checkbox-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; }
/* Type filter tabs — matches Zuar's tag/filter pills */
.zgm-search-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.zgm-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 9px; color: var(--z-text3); pointer-events: none; }
/* Block card — matches Zuar's block/page cards */
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
.zgm-card-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
/* Block type badges — matches Zuar's type labels in block editor */
.zgm-type-tag--html        { color: var(--z-red); background: var(--z-red-light); border-color: rgba(232,65,30,0.2); }
.zgm-type-tag--amchart     { color: var(--z-green); background: var(--z-green-bg); border-color: rgba(45,157,78,0.2); }
.zgm-type-tag--multiselect { color: var(--z-blue); background: var(--z-blue-bg); border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.2); }
.zgm-type-tag--data-table  { color: var(--z-warn); background: var(--z-warn-bg); border-color: rgba(180,83,9,0.2); }
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
.zgm-history-btn:hover { background: var(--z-bg) !important; color: var(--z-red) !important; border-color: var(--z-red) !important; }
/* ── Commit Bar — matches Zuar's CANCEL / SAVE bottom bar ──────── */
#zgm-commit-bar-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
/* ── Buttons — matches Zuar's NEW PAGE / SAVE style ────────────── */
/* Primary — Zuar black button (like NEW PAGE) */
/* Ghost — matches Zuar's CANCEL / secondary buttons */
.zgm-btn--ghost:hover { border-color: var(--z-red); color: var(--z-red); background: var(--z-red-light); }
.zgm-commit-msg  { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--z-text); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.zgm-commit-meta { font-family: var(--z-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--z-text3); margin-top: 2px; }
.zgm-diff-meta { font-family: var(--z-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--z-text3); flex: 1; text-align: right; }
.zgm-diff-lnum { display: inline-block; width: 32px; color: var(--z-text3); opacity: 0.5; user-select: none; }
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
.zgm-icon-btn--sm:hover { border-color: var(--z-red); color: var(--z-red); background: var(--z-red-light); }
.zgm-modal-status--info  { background: var(--z-blue-bg);  color: var(--z-blue);   border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2); }
.zgm-modal-status--ok    { background: var(--z-green-bg); color: var(--z-green);  border: 1px solid rgba(45,157,78,0.2); }
.zgm-modal-status--error { background: var(--z-danger-bg); color: var(--z-danger); border: 1px solid rgba(220,38,38,0.2); }
